since_last: 81% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.86%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 81% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.70% · BTC -0.01% · Gold +1.01% · Nasdaq100 +1.59%. 81% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.86%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.86%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.61%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +9.85%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +9.85%, AMD +8.61%, ANET +8.23%, INOD +7.80%, VRT +7.45%. Laggards: AVAV -4.48%, INTU -2.24%, HON -1.77%, MSFT -1.62%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.54% at $161.13
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.54% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
